intro.title: Build a living resume system, not a one-off file
intro.description: Capture achievements, tighten weak spots, and keep every version anchored to a clean factual core.

hero.title: Claimit keeps your evidence organized, adaptable, and ready to ship.
hero.description: Move from import to library, assistant, tailored versions, and final export without losing the reasoning behind each line.

import.label: Import
import.description: Turn existing resume files into structured source material.

memory.label: Library
memory.description: Store achievements, signals, and supporting details in one place.

assistant.label: Assistant
assistant.description: Spot gaps in impact, scope, and clarity before they ship.

variants.label: Variants
variants.description: Shape the same facts into role-specific narratives.

render.label: Export
render.description: Preview polished layouts and produce final output quickly.

currentBaseResume.title: Current base resume
currentBaseResume.filled: {count} experience entries are connected to the workspace.

recommendedNextStep.title: Recommended next step
recommendedNextStep.emptyDescription: Turn raw experience into structured evidence you can reuse later.
recommendedNextStep.filledDescription: Use the current library to shape a role-specific narrative.

operationalLoop.title: Operational loop
operationalLoop.headline: Your resume workflow, kept deliberately organized
operationalLoop.memoryDescription: Capture achievements once, then reuse them across versions, claims, and exports.
operationalLoop.assistantDescription: Surface missing metrics, scope, and narrative clarity before a version goes out.
operationalLoop.variantsDescription: Reframe the same factual record for different roles without rewriting from scratch.
operationalLoop.renderDescription: Move from structured data to polished ATS-friendly output with less formatting friction.

snapshot.title: Workspace snapshot
snapshot.headline: What is already in motion
snapshot.baseSummaryEmpty: No summary yet. Use the assistant to sharpen the narrative.
snapshot.variantCoverageEmpty: No tailored versions yet. Create one once the base resume is stable.
snapshot.variantCoverageFilled: {count} tailored versions are saved and ready for refinement.

intro.title: Bring an existing resume into the workspace
intro.description: Drop in a PDF, DOCX, JSON, or plain-text source and Claimit will turn it into a clean base file for the rest of the workflow.

dropzone.title: Drop your resume into the workspace
dropzone.description: Claimit parses the file, initializes the base structure, and makes it available for the library, assistant, versions, and export.
dropzone.structuredParsingDescription: Turns a legacy resume into workspace-backed JSON.
dropzone.reusableFactsDescription: Feeds achievements, claims, and variants downstream.
dropzone.readyToRefineDescription: Move straight into assistant and export workflows.

intro.title: Turn raw work into a reusable evidence library
intro.description: This is where accomplishments become durable building blocks. Capture them cleanly and reuse them across assistant suggestions, versions, and final resume lines.

empty.title: Your evidence library is empty
empty.description: Add one entry or import a resume first. Once the library has enough signal, Claimit can produce sharper suggestions and stronger versions.

detail.description: Tighten the wording, tag the entry more precisely, and keep the underlying fact strong enough to power versions and final claims.

form.description: Structure high-signal facts once so the assistant, versions, and export pipeline can reuse them later.
form.summaryPlaceholder: Describe the achievement and why it mattered.
form.tipDescription: Include the action, outcome, and tools so later versions have stronger raw material to work with.
form.suggestedTagsValue: impact, growth, product, platform, ops, ai
form.updatedToastDescription: The evidence library has been refreshed.

experienceSection.emptyDescription: Import a resume or add achievements so the structured timeline has something to render.

skillsSection.emptyDescription: Skills become more useful once they are imported or grouped into categories for versions and export.

intro.title: Let the assistant expose the weak spots
intro.description: The assistant reviews the current resume, spots missing impact, scope, and clarity, then helps you strengthen the story without bending the facts.

panel.analysisDescription: Scores the current resume and highlights where impact, scope, or clarity are still thin.
panel.questionSetDescription: Focus on the highest-value prompts first instead of rewriting everything at once.
panel.applyChangesDescription: Write improved wording and metrics back into the workspace once your answers are ready.
panel.readyMessage: Answer the questions below, then apply them to update the structured resume.
panel.emptyMessage: Import or add resume content first so the assistant has material to analyze.

changeLog.title: Applied changes
changeLog.emptyDescription: Answer a few assistant prompts and apply them to see your improvement log here.

intro.title: Shape the same facts into role-specific narratives
intro.description: Versions help you reposition your experience for a specific opportunity. Build one from the current workspace, then review the changes before export.

list.title: Saved versions
list.description: Reopen any saved version to compare it against the base resume.
list.emptyDescription: Once the base resume has enough signal, use the panel on the left to generate a more targeted version.

builder.title: Create a role-specific narrative
builder.description: Use a job description to reorder emphasis, surface the right claims, and prepare a more targeted version.
builder.roleFitDescription: Clarify which experience should lead the story.
builder.keywordSignalDescription: Map the base resume against role-specific language.
builder.factsDescription: Adjust emphasis without changing the underlying truth.

detail.description: Review how this version shifts emphasis compared with the base resume before you export or continue refining.

intro.title: Preview, polish, and export the final document
intro.description: Switch templates, inspect the document surface, and produce an export-ready PDF without leaving the workspace.

workspace.outputMindsetDescription: Use the template layer to polish, not to rescue missing facts.
workspace.outputMindsetBody: Claimit works best when the base resume and any tailored version are already clean. The export studio should feel like a final pass, not a repair step.
workspace.previewCanvasDescription: Inspect the current document surface before exporting.

templateSelector.title: Switch the document presentation
templateSelector.description: Use the preview loop to compare templates, then export a PDF once the layout feels right.
templateSelector.atsDescription: Best for crisp, ATS-oriented formatting with a straightforward hierarchy.
templateSelector.modernDescription: Best for a calmer document surface with slightly more warmth.
templateSelector.renderNotesBody: Keep versions factual, then use export to tune presentation instead of rewriting content at the last step.

pdfPreview.title: Document preview
pdfPreview.description: The live HTML surface mirrors the current export pipeline output.

notFound.title: This workspace view could not be found
notFound.description: The route may have moved, or the requested resume item no longer exists.
